top_signals.signal: Weekly plans = 55% of all app revenue (Adapty 2026). Weekly+trial = strongest LTV. 6x better iOS conversion than Android.
top_signals.action: Switch PrayerLock/scripture-streak to weekly plan as PRIMARY offer. Add trial. Expected: 2-4x revenue vs monthly-only.

top_signals.signal: /mo = 0 conversions. /mo = immediate paying customers. Lower anchors kill perceived value.
top_signals.action: Set PrayerLock at .99/wk or .99/mo NOT .99/mo. Faith apps proven higher WTP than generic.

top_signals.signal: Finch Self-Care Pet - 652K ratings at 5.0 stars. Virtual pet mechanic = extreme retention + review velocity.
top_signals.action: Add virtual companion/pet mechanic to PrayerLock. Prayer = feed/grow pet. Drive reviews.

top_signals.signal: Apple Small Business Program: 15% commission under M/yr. Jumps to 30% after.
top_signals.action: All app factory apps factor 15% not 30% for first-year revenue projections.

top_signals.signal: 0 MRR x5 months -> positioning change -> ,800 MRR in 6 weeks. Product unchanged.
top_signals.action: PrayerLock positioning: NOT generic faith app. Frame as: The only prayer tracker built for Ramadan. Niche-first.

strategic_insight: CRITICAL WINDOW: Weekly pricing + trial = proven revenue maximizer. Finch virtual pet mechanic = differentiation play. Ramadan 25 days remaining - PrayerLock monetization must launch THIS WEEK not next. Switch to weekly .99/wk + 3-day trial immediately.
ramadan_urgency: Day 15 of Ramadan (Feb 28 start). 15 days remaining = peak prayer engagement. Every day without monetization = lost revenue.
